unknown_answers.u_workflow_001: Escalate before changing V1 scope or critical architecture constraints.

agent_behavior_rules: Start with diagnostics, then propose minimal changes.
context_update_rules: Update PROJECT_STATE and NEXT_CHAT_CONTEXT after material decisions.
escalation_rules: Escalate when repository boundaries or release criteria change.
task_tracking_rules: Attach evidence path for each completed task.
